summary: Unified System Settings, smarter AI tone, fixed calendar views, and streak accuracy improvements.

notes: Unified System Settings: Account, Notifications, Customize Dashboard, and Software Update in one grouped card
AI assistant tone rewritten — supportive planning partner, never judgmental
Calendar yearly view: readable mini-grids with day-of-week headers and circular today highlight
Streak algorithm fix: no longer resets to zero at start of day
Dashboard metrics clarified: Today count and Load score now clearly labeled
Software Update section: real version detection, cache-clearing update flow
Fixed theme-aware colors in Progress Details and Active Session sheets
Replaced hardcoded dark-only colors with adaptive CSS variables
Added Missed/Skip option to task completion prompt
Time-safe rescheduling — past time slots are now disabled
Removed hardcoded demo data — all stats now use real user data
Simplified swipe-to-delete: single tap, immediate action with undo
Built Active Session sheet with live countdown timer
Added real-time progress bar across all schedule views
Notification scheduler with browser push support
Workload balance sheet with interactive filters
